name: Is my firm eligible for GEO if we're not Am Law 200?

mainEntity.name: Is my firm eligible for GEO if we're not Am Law 200?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, small firms thrive in GEO with hyper-local content like 'Houston probate steps.'**[3][9] No size barrier; utility wins.[3] **Key factors:** 1. Focus niche questions. 2. Prove experience via bios. 3. Free to start. **List 20 local Qs, answer authoritatively; small firms lead locally.**[6] All eligible.[3]
